response.justification: The candidate is technically excellent and clearly exceeds the requirements, with deep TypeScript/Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and even LLM/MCP experience that covers both the required and nice-to-have lists. However, this is an entry-level individual-contributor posting and the applicant is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience, creating a significant overqualification, compensation, and retention mismatch. On-site presence is required but the stated location (Lagos, Nigeria) is far from a German-based team, and PostgreSQL/Nest.js are not explicitly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong fullstack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across many years
Covers nice-to-haves: AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/MCP agent tooling
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role (flight/comp risk)
On-site requirement vs. listed Lagos location and only basic German
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience (MongoDB/MySQL instead)
